reviews.author: jithin k
reviews.review_body: Very happy with school and the faculty, my daughter is studying here for past two years and have shown good progress academically and actively participates in extracurricular activities. Credit goes to the teachers. Kudos 👏

reviews.author: dharani d
reviews.review_body:
One of the best school in coimbatore
The care and the love they show towards the child in playschool is truly amazing

Best school in teaching
Making their best in making child the best

reviews.author: Ganga Rajalakshmi Mariappan
reviews.review_body: Yeah it's very nice school in Coimbatore my two kids studying in tis school they have wonderful experience the teacher s are very friendly with childrens

reviews.author: Elizabeth Hannel
reviews.review_body: My daughter studying in nursery class and I really loved the coaching and fun activities which is given in class and she really enjoying going to school. Everything worth for her education

reviews.author: charlie sierra
reviews.review_body: To me as a parent I feel the kindergarten garden kids need not be in school until evening and they need to given all the physical activities. Had been in search of such a school. Found this school where they close for the the day @ the pre-primary kids at 12.15p.m itself. After primary choosing 2sports activity is a must. Their way of making kids understand and attention to individuals can be noticed from your kids. No second thoughts in my opinion.

reviews.author: Aadi Manikandan Sekar
reviews.review_body: My child is in Jr. KG at Vibgyor School, Coimbatore, and I am extremely satisfied with the overall experience. The school provides a well-structured curriculum, excellent facilities, and a nurturing environment that supports both academic and personal growth. The teachers are highly dedicated and ensure personalized attention to every child. I appreciate the focus on holistic development, including extracurricular activities and values. Highly recommend Vibgyor for a strong foundation in early education.

reviews.author: P Pradeepa
reviews.review_body: We are very satisfied about Vibgyor school in Coimbatore. Our child always gets ample opportunities to explore and progress in all aspects. The school has been successful in striking an appropriate balance between Academic and Co-Curricular activities.

reviews.author: trishna bhatt
reviews.review_body:
I am extremely happy with the progress my child has made at Vibgyor High. The teachers have done an exceptional job in nurturing not just academic excellence but also important life skills. I can see a remarkable improvement in my child's performance and learning abilities, which is a testament to the dedicated efforts of the school staff and the positive learning environment that the school has created.
Thank you for inspiring our children to grow and succeed.
